form.formComment: Five-year-old gelding (Time Test - Ritzy Sparkle) has trialled on five occasions leading into today's race. Was third in a Foxton barrier trial over 1200m on November 11. Happy to watch this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Five-year-old gelding (Time Test - Ritzy Sparkle) has trialled on five occasions leading into today's race. Was third in a Foxton barrier trial over 1200m on November 11. Happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at Ellerslie December 11 over 1200m, soft track; 14 len behind Miss Jones with 57kg at $43.80. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at New Plymouth Raceway October 24 over 1200m, in the wet; 5 len behind Circus Dancer carrying 57.5kg at $2.40. Looks all set for a bright return.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Gelding back from a spell of four months. Has placed previously first up from a break. Finished off last campaign when last of 10 at Ellerslie December 11 over 1200m, soft track; 14 len behind Miss Jones with 57kg at $43.80. When resuming last campaign third in a small field at New Plymouth Raceway October 24 over 1200m, in the wet; 5 len behind Circus Dancer carrying 57.5kg at $2.40. Looks all set for a bright return.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide without cover throughout.
Eased down over the final 200m when out of contention.
Over the concluding stages, shifted in slightly when clear.
Slow to begin. Lost contact with the body of the field in the early stages.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Circus Maximus out of Trepidation. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1200m at Avondale March 24. Has the pedigree so could measure up without surprising.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Circus Maximus out of Trepidation. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1200m at Avondale March 24. Has the pedigree so could measure up without surprising.

previousStarts.trainer: KEVIN & STEPHEN GRAY, COPPER BELT LODGE

form.formComment: Three-year-old gelding by Darci Brahma out of Lady Rudolph having his first start. Has not been produced at official trials. Can measure up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Three-year-old gelding by Darci Brahma out of Lady Rudolph having his first start. Has not been produced at official trials. Can measure up.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Nadeem out of Ruby Love. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1000m at Foxton January 13. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Nadeem out of Ruby Love. At the most recent trial was out of the placings over 1000m at Foxton January 13. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at New Plymouth Raceway December 4 over 1200m, in the wet; 2.75 len behind See You In Beijing carrying 56.5kg at $4.20. On debut third of 12 at this track September 28 over 1200m, soft track; 1.1 len behind Shameless Star with 56.5kg at $28. Likely to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1.5). Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last campaign sixth of 8 at New Plymouth Raceway December 4 over 1200m, in the wet; 2.75 len behind See You In Beijing carrying 56.5kg at $4.20. On debut third of 12 at this track September 28 over 1200m, soft track; 1.1 len behind Shameless Star with 56.5kg at $28. Likely to feature.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly then crowded shortly after losing ground.
Raced keenly in the early stages.

form.formComment: Resuming after a three-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation third of 11 at Tauranga January 2 over 1400m, soft track; 2 len behind Rising Wind with 55.5kg at $13.10. On debut second last of 7 at Matamata September 12 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Misellabel carrying 55.5kg at $12. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

formComments.title: TAB

On debut second last of 7 at Matamata September 12 over 1400m, on rain affected going; 14 len behind Misellabel carrying 55.5kg at $12. Expecting a bright start to the campaign.

form.formComment: Third-up today. First-up 7th of 10 at this track on January 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Mazino with 56.5kg at $82.50. Last start second last of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Fleur De Blues carrying 55.5kg at $36.20. Has the task ahead.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(1). Third-up today. First-up 7th of 10 at this track on January 28 over 1200m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Mazino with 56.5kg at $82.50. Last start second last of 10 at New Plymouth Raceway on March 7 over 1300m, on a slow track; 14 len behind Fleur De Blues carrying 55.5kg at $36.20. Has the task ahead.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after five months 2nd of 12 at this track on March 18 over 1200m, 0.0 len behind Sant Maurici carrying 56kg at $6.30. Previously second-up 5th of 12 at Bairnsdale Mdn-Sw on October 12 over 1200m, 4 len behind Brutal World carrying 55kg at $5. Can only be further improved and should pay to follow.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly (Vadamos - Amparo). She has four recent trials prior to her debut today. Was runner-up in a trial at Foxton on April 2 over 1000m. Profiles well and a bold run is expected.

form.formComment: First starter by Derryn out of Finesse. Has a total of three trials leading in today's debut. Hard to enthuse on what she has shown.
